title: Risk Quantification — FAIR Monte Carlo + Risk Treatment ROI Pipeline
description: test_risk_quantifier.py, test_risk_treatment_engine.py, and test_risk_quantification_engine_v2.py cluster with test_risk_aggregator_engine.py. The FAIR v2 engine computes SLE/ARO/ALE with control ROI. risk_aggregator_engine gives org-level composite A-F grades. Gap: the FAIR model uses fixed distribution parameters rather than calibrated values from historical incident data, and the treatment ROI is not compared against actual control costs from security_budget_engine.
missing: Historical calibration: query ir_playbook_engine incident costs and use them to calibrate FAIR ARO/SLE distributions instead of fixed defaults
Treatment ROI vs budget: cross-reference risk_treatment ROI projections against actual security_budget_engine allocations to show real vs projected ROI
Monte Carlo visualization data: /api/v1/risk-quant/simulation/{id}/histogram returning ALE distribution buckets for frontend loss-exceedance curve rendering
